field_a: Fe-S cluster biogenesis (NFS1, ISCU2, FDX2, FXN, GLRX5, CISD2)
bridge_concepts: IRP1 [4Fe-4S] cluster occupancy as feeding-entrained iron-redox sensor
CISD2 [2Fe-2S] at MAMs as redox-gated Ca2+ regulator
CIA/CIAO3 pathway as LIP/ROS-responsive gate for cytoplasmic Fe-S proteins
Frataxin as substrate-sensitive bottleneck in FTMT-negative tissues
Conserved Fe-S → clock dependency in neurons
